description_long: This is a brightly colored baseball cap featuring a yellow crown and a blue brim. The front panel displays a large, bold 'SKELETON WARRIORS' logo in red and white, accompanied by a stylized skull graphic with a horned helmet. The side panels are adorned with the word 'WARRIORS' in large, red outlined letters, and the back features an adjustable strap opening. The cap appears to be made of soft fabric, likely cotton or a cotton blend, with visible stitching along the seams and brim. The overall design is sporty and eye-catching, suitable for casual urban wear and likely intended for fans of the Skeleton Warriors franchise.
description: A yellow and blue baseball cap with a bold 'SKELETON WARRIORS' logo and horned skull graphic, featuring an adjustable strap at the back.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the 'SKELETON WARRIORS' logo, horned skull graphic, and part of the blue brim.
description_view_1: Front-right view highlighting the full logo, skull graphic, and the curvature of the blue brim.
description_view_2: Left side view displaying the large 'SKELETON' text and partial view of the adjustable strap opening.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the horned skull graphic, the end of the 'WARRIORS' text, and the open adjustable strap area.
